name: Terabee Instruction Manuals
description: Translated 3D product models into precise technical line art for instruction and installation manuals across People Counting and Silo Counting devices.

name: TENIX Padel/Tennis Trainer
subtitle: Acero Inox — Stainless Steel Base
description: Technical patent illustration for the TENIX Padel/Tennis Trainer — a commercial sports training device with a stainless steel weighted base, filed for international patent protection.

name: HVAC Technician Reference Manual
description: Designed a print-ready industrial field manual from Figma mockups — refining, vectorizing and unifying layouts into a cohesive technician reference booklet.

name: 18 Origami Instruction Illustrations
description: Designed and illustrated 18 origami folding sequences with step-by-step instruction guides crafted for young audiences in a clear, engaging visual style.

name: Scientific Illustration — Teacher Enthusiasm
description: Created visualizations for a peer-reviewed publication on measuring teacher enthusiasm, collaborating with Prof. Anne Frenzel at the University of Munich.
